name: Gluten Free Enchilada Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the dry ingredients.
2. Gradually add 1 quart of cold water to the dry mixture in a deep saucepan.
3. Stir constantly and cook over medium heat until the mixture simmers and thickens.
Use this sauce over enchiladas or to season grain dishes. Refrigerate extra sauce. To make more sauce, double or triple the dry ingredients and use 3/4 cup of the dry mix for each quart of cold water added.
